title: arctium nemorosum subsp. pubens
intro: Arctium nemorosum subsp. pubens is a subspecies of the lesser burdock plant, which belongs to the dandelion and thistle family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Arctium nemorosum subsp. pubens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for natural remedies.
